overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Rancho Coronado Public Park in Night City during golden hour. The character explores a paved entrance path lined with palm trees, passes benches with seated NPCs, and veers into a grassy area with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: public park entrance with digital signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the park entrance path past the illuminated Night City sign

notable_agents.action: NPC in red top walking along the left side of the path

entered.detail: illuminated digital sign displaying 'NIGHT CITY RANCHO CORONADO PUBLIC PARK'
tall cylindrical glass skyscraper with '07' marking visible on the facade
tall palm trees lining both sides of the entrance pathway
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the entrance to Rancho Coronado Public Park with a prominent illuminated sign. The character walks along a paved path lined with palm trees, with the futuristic Night City skyline and a distinctive cylindrical mega-building visible in the golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: park interior pathway with seating areas

events.description: approaching and passing a concrete bench with two NPCs seated and conversing

agents.ego_description: continuing along the gravel path, passing by NPCs seated on a bench to the left

notable_agents.action: two NPCs sitting on a concrete bench, one wearing red and white clothing
NPC with backpack and shorts walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: modern concrete park bench with two seated individuals
large vertical billboard with purple background advertising food
futuristic white web-like architectural dome structure

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the park along a gravel path, passing a concrete bench where two NPCs are seated. A large purple billboard becomes visible on the left, and a distinctive white dome structure appears in the distance against the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy park area with scattered trees and abandoned vehicle

events.description: character veers left off the main gravel path into the grassy dirt area

agents.ego_description: leaving the established path to explore the grassy terrain to the left side of the park

entered.detail: derelict green car parked among the trees and vegetation
small rustic wooden house with brown roof visible through the trees
wooden utility poles with overhead power lines running parallel to the park

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the main path and explores a grassy dirt area, passing an abandoned green vehicle. A rustic wooden house and power lines become visible to the left, while the white dome structure shifts to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: park interior pathway with scattered benches

events.description: returning to the gravel path from the grassy area

agents.ego_description: walking along the gravel path approaching a group of NPCs ahead

notable_agents.action: NPC in red pants walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: multiple concrete benches lining the left side of the path
scattered papers and debris on the ground near the benches

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the gravel path and continues through the park interior, passing scattered benches and litter. The white dome structure remains visible to the left as the character approaches other NPCs walking along the path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the formal entrance of Rancho Coronado Public Park into its more weathered and overgrown interior during the golden hour. It begins at a prominent illuminated sign, following the character along a paved path lined with palm trees beneath a skyline dominated by a cylindrical mega-building. As the character moves deeper into the park, the pavement shifts to gravel, passing seated NPCs and a large purple billboard while a white dome structure emerges in the distance. The scene then veers off the main path into a grassy dirt area featuring an abandoned green vehicle and a rustic wooden house before turning back toward the gravel walkway. Finally, the camera continues through the park interior past scattered litter and benches, keeping the white dome to the left while approaching other pedestrians ahead.
